nodes.name: 🔔 Webhook — Get Brand Config
nodes.notes: Called by ALL other workflows. Send {genre, product_category, product_name} and receive full brand config back. This is the single source of truth for all brand settings.

nodes.name: ⚙️ Brand Registry + Genre Router
nodes.notes: THE MASTER CONFIG NODE. Contains all brand settings for all 3 brands. Edit this single node to update anything system-wide. Genre routing table maps product categories to the correct brand automatically.

nodes.name: 🔍 Validate Brand Config
nodes.notes: Scans all credentials for unconfigured YOUR_* placeholders. Reports which stores and social platforms are actually ready. Prevents publishing to unconfigured stores.

nodes.name: 📊 Log Brand Resolution
nodes.notes: Logs every brand config lookup. Useful for debugging routing issues and tracking which brand is being used most.

nodes.name: 📤 Return Brand Config
nodes.notes: Returns the complete brand config to whichever workflow called this. The calling workflow then uses brand.stores, brand.social, brand.voice, etc.

meta.description: Workflow 06: Master Brand Config System. Single source of truth for all 3 brand settings. Called by every other workflow via webhook. Contains brand identity, store credentials, social account IDs, halal guardrails, SEO keywords, pricing strategy, and voice profiles. Genre routing table automatically maps product categories to the correct brand.
